message:
fix: guard bd v0.58.0 non-JSON output in remaining parsers (gt-ac0i)

Fix-merge of PR #2399. Main already guards listFromDir and beads.List
via isJSON/isJSONBytes helpers. This commit extends the guard to:

- deacon/stale_hooks.go: listHookedBeads (replace old string-match guard)
- mail/mailbox.go: getFromDir (add isJSON guard before unmarshal)
- mail/mailbox.go: listByThreadBeads (replace old len/null guard with isJSON)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
